name: claude-certification
description: Claude Certification project — Next.js + FastAPI Turborepo
author: santi020k

scripts.types:api: PYTHONPATH=apps/api apps/api/.venv/bin/python scripts/export-openapi.py && openapi-typescript packages/shared/openapi.json --default-non-nullable false -o packages/shared/src/openapi.d.ts
scripts.api:check: pnpm run api:lint && pnpm run api:typecheck && pnpm run api:test
